notes: Phase 2 (Ulduar 25) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Fury Warrior Dps gear guide. Rings/Trinkets: the source lists 2-3 ranked options in one row (you equip two) — split here into two named slots, top pick in slot 1; combined source text kept for both. Enchants/gems reused from the matching wotlk/p4 spec profile (same stat priorities apply across phases).

gems.name: Relentless Earthsiege Diamond (+37 crit, +3% crit damage — meta requirements must be met)
Fractured Cardinal Ruby (+23 crit) — or Bold Cardinal Ruby (+23 Str)
Inscribed Ametrine / Etched Ametrine (Str+crit or Str+hit) — or Rigid King's Amber (+16 crit) for socket bonus
Nightmare Tear (activates the meta gem by itself)
